checks.failure_policy: Block PR merge; fix non-DB replay governance regressions before merge.
checks.rollback_policy: If systemic CI outage, temporarily pause requirement via policy exception; do not remove test semantics.

promotion_criteria: >= 3 PR dry-runs PASS without manual patching
Failure triage consistently classifiable within 1 business day
checks.failure_policy: Classify as fixture/integrity/schema/test regression; do not accept skip-based pass.
checks.rollback_policy: Can remain non-required while fixing fixture pipeline; must keep fail-fast and no-fake-pass behavior.

checks.failure_policy: Treat as fixture build/integrity drift incident; block dedicated pass and open remediation task.
checks.rollback_policy: May temporarily keep dedicated lane manual-only; never bypass integrity check while claiming dedicated success.

checks.promotion_criteria: Only after artifact governance and data custody controls are formalized.
checks.failure_policy: Non-blocking for normal PRs; opens data-parity investigation.
checks.rollback_policy: Disable parity lane if artifact pipeline unstable; keep core default/dedicated synthetic lanes intact.
